// GOOD: explicit re-exports with clear public surface
pub use crate::handlers::{handle_request, handle_response};
pub use crate::models::{User, Order};
pub use crate::config::Config;

mod handlers {
    pub fn handle_request() {}
    pub fn handle_response() {}
    pub(crate) fn internal_handler() {}
}

mod models {
    pub struct User {}
    pub struct Order {}
    pub(crate) struct InternalModel {}
}

mod utils {
    pub(crate) fn format_date() {}
    pub(crate) fn parse_json() {}
}

mod config {
    pub struct Config {}
    pub fn load() {}
}
